description: Designed and built a desktop application for wireless PIC microcontroller communication, improving data transmission efficiency by 30%. Developed serial communication tools for device initialization and data parsing, reducing manual configuration time by 40%. Performed high-volume sensor data analysis to identify patterns and optimize system performance.

Developed a real-time energy monitoring system using Python's serial library, achieving 99% data accuracy. Streamlined hardware-software integration across cross-functional teams, resulting in a 20% improvement in energy system efficiency.

Built predictive models using machine learning algorithms on large datasets for HR retention analysis. Conducted exploratory data analysis to surface actionable insights. Optimized a Random Forest classifier to 94% accuracy through systematic hyperparameter tuning.
